title: Richard Pack The Squeakuel
description: Cobblemon and guns! With the fellas!
body:
This modpack's core focus is on Cobblemon.

This pack is heavily exploration/multiplayer based with many popular Cobblemon side mods and datapacks to add nifty new changes and additions. Along with in-game voice chat to have a grand old time with your friends. Lots of new structures, dungeons and artifacts to find while catching cool pokemon. Oh The Biomes We've Gone provides overhauls to the overworld with many new biomes to explore, as well as BetterNether and BetterEnd! Along with The Aether to explore to spice up the adventure and for some reason guns to add to the chaos.

This is my first modpack published so feel free to contact me through discord @GodlyGamer for any questions or recommendations!
